author: DominicVainMod
content:
@here

Multichain Ventures Acquisition

In a strategic move marked by a cashless transaction, Star Atlas integrates Multichain Ventures, including all intellectual property of Project Tokes.

Tokes holders will be able to bridge their tokens to Solana and exchange those tokens for Cultivation Facilities in Star Atlas.

 | Learn more about the acquisition and Cultivation Facilities: https://medium.com/star-atlas/a-metaverse-in-expansion-star-atlas-acquires-assets-and-intellectual-property-from-multichain-597c5f4d7f2c
